name: volt-absorb
short_effect: Absorbs electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
effect_text: Whenever an electric-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it.  This ability will not take effect if this Pokémon is ground-type and thus immune to Electric moves.  Electric moves will ignore this Pokémon's substitute.  This effect includes non-damaging moves, i.e. thunder wave.
flavor_text: If hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
